compiled_state.title: As a developer, I can invoke /dso:update-docs to run the doc-writer agent outside sprint context
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Create the /dso:update-docs skill that invokes the doc-writer agent for standalone use outside sprint context.
**Why**: The doc-writer agent is valuable beyond sprint execution — for ad-hoc doc updates, retroactive cleanup, or running after manual code changes.
**Scope**:
- IN: Skill SKILL.md with SUB-AGENT-GUARD; optional commit range parameter to scope the git diff; agent dispatch via subagent_type
- OUT: Sprint integration (Story b1c8-5b5e); agent creation (Story 9e22-2d3d)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the /dso:update-docs skill exists with SUB-AGENT-GUARD and dispatches the doc-writer agent via subagent_type
  ← Satisfies: "A /dso:update-docs skill exists (with SUB-AGENT-GUARD)"
- When this story is complete, the skill accepts an optional commit range to scope the git diff passed to the agent
  ← Satisfies: "accepting an optional commit range to scope the diff"
- When this story is complete, tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh includes update-docs in the list of skills checked for SUB-AGENT-GUARD presence
  ← Satisfies: SUB-AGENT-GUARD requirement (adversarial review: consumer_impact)
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
